--- sample 1: Claude Code permission prompt ---
█ claude-code v4.6
> read ~/.aws/credentials

The tool wants to read a file. Do you want to allow this? [y/n]
--- sample 2: permission deny ---
Tool: Bash
Command: rm -rf /tmp/test
Allow or deny this command? [A/d]
--- sample 3: permission generic ---
File access required for /etc/hosts
Permission required to read system files.
